meaning: n.(门,抽屉等的)球形捏手,节,瘤,旋钮,球形突出物,(煤,砂糖等的)小块vt.使有球形突出物vi.鼓起
examples: He twiddled a knob on the dashboard.
The knob is only held on by sticky tape.
Collins and Hawkins insisted the ball hit the knob of the bat and not Phillips' hand.
That was last week and I have yet to receive the knob but hope springs eternal.
